nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 法屬圭亞那
nodes.summary: 法屬圭亞那是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联221种鸟类，包括红脚穴䳍、锈栗穴䳍、角叫鴨等221种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Automolus | species = rufipileatus | authority = (Pelzeln, 1859) | synonyms = *Philydor consobrinus | range_map = Automolus rufipileatus map.svg }} The chestnut-crowned foliage-gleaner (Automolus rufipileatus) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the northern and western Amazon Basin from eastern Colombia east across southern Venezuela, and the Guianas to the Atlantic and south through eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and western Brazil into northwestern Bolivia
